installation_context.context: Installed on GT001 as replacement for FS001
Installed on GT013 after redeployment from MO_001

decision_history.trigger: Initial degradation detected during mission M01
decision_history.remarks: Condition not critical, no immediate replacement required

decision_history.trigger: Post-mission M03 degradation confirmed via flow sensor trend
decision_history.remarks: Degradation stable and within acceptable limits

detection_history.remarks: Approaching clogging condition during mission M01
Post-mission M03 degradation detected in FS001 on GT013

properties.expert_notes: Mission M01 initiated; FS001 vibration anomaly detected mid-mission leading to early termination and return to dockyard
Ship routed to dockyard after FS001 failure during mission; maintenance initiated
FS001 removed from GT001 and sent for repair after fuel pump anomaly detected
FS001 moved to material organisation after replacement by FS013
FS013 stored at material organisation as ready spare before replacement of FS001
Combat group CG2 deployed for Mission GFM03; FS001 showed degradation signals but system remained operational and mission completed
